description: Router selection accuracy — includes adversarial pairs that the description `Not for:` boundaries must disambiguate

prompts.prompt: I'm not sure where to start — I need to fix a bug and then commit it
Build a landing page for our API product
Make the button animation smoother
/brag about what we built
How does authentication work in this repo?
Add streaming chat with the AI SDK
Write a PRD before we build the dashboard
Deploy to Vercel and smoke test the preview
Fix this typo in the header and open a PR — I already know the change
prompts.boundary: ship vs debug — known change, no investigation

prompts.prompt: The checkout button throws a 500 sometimes and I don't know why
prompts.boundary: debug vs ship — unknown root cause

prompts.prompt: The dropdown looks fine but selecting an item shows the wrong data
prompts.boundary: debug vs frontend — visual surface, logic bug

prompts.prompt: Give the hero section a parallax scroll effect
prompts.boundary: motion vs frontend — existing UI, motion only

prompts.prompt: Show me where the rate limiter is defined and how it's called
prompts.boundary: explore vs debug — no symptom, just understanding

prompts.prompt: How do I configure the Stripe SDK for subscriptions?
prompts.boundary: integrate vs explore — third-party library docs

prompts.prompt: Extract the pricing logic into its own module without changing behavior
Open the app in a browser and check the signup flow works
prompts.boundary: qa vs test — real browser, not writing test files

prompts.prompt: Write unit tests for the invoice calculator
Add an RLS policy so users only see their own orders
Audit the codebase for secrets and injection risks
Rewrite the landing copy and improve its SEO
prompts.boundary: marketing vs frontend — copy/SEO, not building UI

prompts.prompt: Design the agent's operating loop with error recovery and an eval gate
prompts.boundary: agents/loop vs ai — loop engineering, not a single SDK feature

prompts.prompt: My agent keeps drifting off task and re-reading the same files — help me debug the loop
prompts.boundary: loop debugging routes to loop-engineering child
